name: Lucas Nichols
bio: Lucas Nichols serves as the District Attorney for Tyler County, prosecuting felony criminal cases in the Woodville area. He is committed to ensuring justice and public safety for Tyler County residents.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent crime in Tyler County
Combat illegal drug activity in the Big Thicket region
Advocate for the rights of crime victims
Maintain transparency and accountability in the DA's office
Work with law enforcement to improve community safety
